items.id: Selalu siapkan uang tunai kecil untuk warung & parkir di sekitar YIA.
items.en: Always keep small cash for local warungs & parking around YIA.

items.id: Sinyal seluler kuat di area bandara; ratai paket data 30 hari saat tiba.
items.en: Mobile signal is strong near the airport; grab a 30-day data SIM on arrival.

items.id: Kereta Bandara YIA menghubungkan langsung ke Stasiun Tugu Yogyakarta.
items.en: The YIA Airport Train connects directly to Yogyakarta Tugu Station.

items.id: Jam produktif terbaik di cafe lokal: 09.00–11.00 sebelum ramai.
items.en: Best focus hours at local cafes: 9–11 AM before it gets busy.
